scripts.build:css: npm run build:core && npm run build:themes
scripts.build:core: sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/core.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/core.css && sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/core-dark.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/core-dark.css
scripts.build:themes: sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/theme-bordered.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-bordered.css && sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/theme-bordered-dark.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-bordered-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/theme-default.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-default.css && sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/theme-default-dark.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-default-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/theme-raspberry.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-raspberry.css && sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/theme-raspberry-dark.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-raspberry-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/theme-semi-dark.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-semi-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=wwwroot/node_modules wwwroot/scss/theme-semi-dark-dark.scss wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-semi-dark-dark.css
